story.tasks: - Task 1: Review current tsconfig.json (AC: #1) - Subtask 1.1: Read existing tsconfig.json - Subtask 1.2: Document current strict settings status - Subtask 1.3: Identify gaps from required strict flags - Task 2: Enable TypeScript strict mode flags (AC: #1) - Subtask 2.1: Set strict: true in tsconfig.json - Subtask 2.2: Set noImplicitAny: true - Subtask 2.3: Set strictNullChecks: true - Subtask 2.4: Set strictFunctionTypes: true - Subtask 2.5: Set strictBindCallApply: true - Subtask 2.6: Set strictPropertyInitialization: true - Subtask 2.7: Set noImplicitThis: true - Subtask 2.8: Set alwaysStrict: true - Task 3: Fix TypeScript compilation errors (AC: #2) - Subtask 3.1: Run npx tsc --noEmit to identify type errors - Subtask 3.2: Fix implicit any type errors - Subtask 3.3: Fix strict null/undefined check errors - Subtask 3.4: Fix property initialization errors - Subtask 3.5: Fix function type binding errors - Subtask 3.6: Test: Verify npx tsc --noEmit passes - Task 4: Add type-check to CI/CD pipeline (AC: #3) - Subtask 4.1: Add type-check step to GitHub Actions workflow - Subtask 4.2: Add npm run type-check script to package.json - Subtask 4.3: Test: Verify CI/CD type-check stage - Task 5: Verify VS Code TypeScript IntelliSense (AC: #4) - Subtask 5.1: Open TypeScript files in VS Code - Subtask 5.2: Verify strict type checking shows warnings - Subtask 5.3: Test: Type hints for strict null checks - Subtask 5.4: Test: Property initialization warnings

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. tsconfig.json strict settings: - strict: true - noImplicitAny: true - strictNullChecks: true - strictFunctionTypes: true - strictBindCallApply: true - strictPropertyInitialization: true - noImplicitThis: true - alwaysStrict: true 2. All existing code compiles without errors 3. CI/CD: TypeScript compilation check 4. VS Code: TypeScript IntelliSense fully leveraged

doc.title: Epic 12: Code Quality & Standards
doc.snippet: TypeScript strict mode enforced for maximum type safety. Includes strict: true, noImplicitAny, strictNullChecks, and related flags.

doc.title: Epic 12 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Canonical tsconfig.json structure with comprehensive strict compiler flags for maximum type safety enforcement.

doc.title: Epic 12 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Type-check stage integration in build pipeline with lint and format checks for quality gates.

doc.title: Epic 12 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Type checking overhead target: < 5 seconds for full project to maintain developer productivity.

doc.title: PRD Non-Functional Requirements - Coding Standards
doc.snippet: Testing patterns and quality standards for hrsync-backend codebase including TypeScript strict mode requirements.

file.reason: Main TypeScript configuration file - currently has strict: true, needs remaining 7 strict flags added
Pre-commit hook that will need type-check stage added for Story 12-4 integration
GitHub Actions CI workflow that needs type-check stage added for quality gates
NPM scripts configuration - will add type-check script here
TypeScript source files that must compile without errors under strict mode

constraints.constraint: All 8 strict mode flags must be enabled in tsconfig.json for maximum type safety
Type checking must complete in < 5 seconds for developer productivity (NFR from tech-spec)
All existing code must compile without errors under strict mode
Type-check stage must be added to CI/CD pipeline as mandatory quality gate
Pre-commit hook must include type-check to block commits with type errors
VS Code IntelliSense must be fully leveraged for strict type checking

interface.name: TypeScript CLI
interface.description: TypeScript compiler command for type-checking without emitting files

interface.name: NPM Script: type-check
interface.description: NPM script wrapper for TypeScript type-checking

interface.name: GitHub Actions: type-check
interface.description: CI/CD pipeline step for TypeScript type checking

tests.standards: Testing follows Epic-9 established patterns using Jest. TypeScript strict mode requires type-safe test code with proper null checks and explicit any handling. Tests should verify type-check stage in CI/CD and validate strict compilation of all TypeScript files.
tests.locations: test/ (unit tests), test/jest-e2e.json (E2E config), test/integration/ (integration tests), tests written in TypeScript following Jest patterns from Epic-9

test.idea: AC-1: Verify all 8 strict flags are enabled
AC-2: Run npx tsc --noEmit and verify zero errors
AC-3: Verify CI/CD pipeline includes type-check stage
AC-4: Verify VS Code shows strict type warnings
Verify pre-commit hook blocks type errors
